evidence.snippet:
Autonomy Command and Control Solutions
======================================
Seamless integration across systems, domains, and platforms
Software Command & Control

items.notes: Core offering is C2 and autonomy software — mission planning, multi-vehicle tasking, HMI for unmanned platforms.

evidence.snippet:
### Autonomy Behaviors
Autonodyne’s library of software behaviors permits your vehicle or team of vehicles to perform a variety of mission-specific maneuvers autonomously.
For a complete inventory of our behaviors see [Autonomy Behaviors.](/autonomy-behaviors)

Autonodyne is continuing to create a comprehensive list of autonomous behaviors/skills that can be used to perform missions. They control a wide range of autonomous, semi-autonomous, and/or highly automated vehicles (air, sea, and land).

items.notes: Library of autonomy behaviors controls wide range of autonomous/semi-autonomous vehicles across air, sea, and land domains.

products_categories.notes: Only 2 pages fetched; /home sections (About, Core Technologies) were skipped — secondary categories may expand.

evidence.snippet:
### Software for your Unmanned Vehicles
Autonodyne software has been integrated on more than 60 makes/models of unmanned platforms. Enabling support for 15 communication protocols, 16 datalink radios, and the ability to host the software on multiple hardware platforms.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells C2 and autonomy software subsystems; integrated on 60+ UAS/UGV/USV makes and models. Does not manufacture hardware platforms.

items.name: Autonomy Behaviors
items.product_type: Library of autonomous mission behaviors for unmanned vehicles

evidence.snippet:
For software licensing and packaging contact [sales@autonodyne.com](mailto:sales@autonodyne.com?)
### Software for your Unmanned Vehicles
Autonodyne software has been integrated on more than 60 makes/models of unmanned platforms. Enabling support for 15 communication protocols, 16 datalink radios, and the ability to host the software on multiple hardware platforms.

readiness.notes: Software actively licensed; deployed on 60+ makes/models of unmanned platforms with 15 comm protocols and 16 datalink radios supported.

tagline: Ground-segment command & control and flight-control autonomy software for multi-vehicle, manned-unmanned teaming across air, sea, and land platforms. Integrated on 60+ UxV makes/models. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Counter-UAS red-teaming services offered. Public evidence of production deployment and government contracts limited.
